MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Angelina Solis judgment debtor in propria persona

No other appearance. Hearing on Claim of exemption. After hearing, tentative is modified: The claim of exemption is granted except for $15 per pay period. Any funds withheld are ordered returned to the judgment debtor. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
